data.description: You have mastered the use of medium armor and can move in it as if it were light armor.
You can use Dexterity instead of Strength for the Acrobatics and Sleight of Hand saving throws and ability checks.
When an opponent attacks a creature you can see within 5 feet of you and you take a hit from that attack, you can choose to take the attack instead of the creature you are provoking.

When you take the Attack action and attack with only a halberd, quarterstaff, glaive, or pike, to a weapon that grants the use of an alternative hand for the purpose of making opportunity attacks, the melee weapon's damage die is a d4, and the attack deals bludgeoning damage.

entities.name: Increase the chosen ability score by 1, to a maximum
